welcome.title: Welcome to Gossip!
welcome.description: Your private messenger designed for secure, end-to-end encrypted conversations. Connect with confidence.

privacy.title: Privacy by Design
privacy.description: All your messages are encrypted and stored locally on your device. Your conversations stay private, always.

get_started.title: Let's Get Started!
get_started.description: Create your account in seconds and start connecting with people securely.
